mapper.select: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C.REG_DT ASC) AS RNUM , COALESCE(C.C_ESNTL_ID, '') AS ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.MBTLNUM), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') AS SEXDSTN_CODE , CASE COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') WHEN 'M' THEN '남자' WHEN 'F' THEN '여자' ELSE '' END AS SEXDSTN_CODE_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(U.BRTHDY, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS BRTHDY , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.IHIDNUM), '') AS IHIDNUM , COALESCE(U.USER_PIC, '') AS USER_PIC FROM ARMCHIL C INNER JOIN ARMUSER U ON C.C_ESNTL_ID = U.ESNTL_ID WHERE C.P_ESNTL_ID = #{pEsntlId} ORDER BY C.REG_DT ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C.REG_DT ASC) AS RNUM , COALESCE(C.P_ESNTL_ID, '') AS ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.MBTLNUM), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') AS SEXDSTN_CODE , CASE COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') WHEN 'M' THEN '남자' WHEN 'F' THEN '여자' ELSE '' END AS SEXDSTN_CODE_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(U.BRTHDY, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS BRTHDY , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.IHIDNUM), '') AS IHIDNUM , COALESCE(U.USER_PIC, '') AS USER_PIC FROM ARMCHIL C INNER JOIN ARMUSER U ON C.P_ESNTL_ID = U.ESNTL_ID WHERE C.C_ESNTL_ID = #{cEsntlId} ORDER BY C.REG_DT ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C.REG_DT ASC) AS RNUM , COALESCE(C.C_ESNTL_ID, '') AS ESNTL_ID , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.USER_NM), '') AS USER_NM , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.MBTLNUM), '') AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') AS SEXDSTN_CODE , CASE COALESCE(U.SEXDSTN_CODE, '') WHEN 'M' THEN '남자' WHEN 'F' THEN '여자' ELSE '' END AS SEXDSTN_CODE_NM , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(U.BRTHDY, '%Y%m%d'), '%Y-%m-%d'), '') AS BRTHDY , COALESCE(DECRYPT(U.IHIDNUM), '') AS IHIDNUM , COALESCE(U.USER_PIC, '') AS USER_PIC FROM ARMCHIL C INNER JOIN ARMUSER U ON C.C_ESNTL_ID = U.ESNTL_ID WHERE C.P_ESNTL_ID = #{pEsntlId} ORDER BY C.REG_DT ASC
SELECT P_ESNTL_ID FROM ARMCHIL WHERE C_ESNTL_ID = #{cEsntlId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ARMCHIL (P_ESNTL_ID, C_ESNTL_ID, REG_DT) VALUES (#{pEsntlId}, #{cEsntlId}, NOW())
